groups.label: Audience Infrastructure & CDP Governance
items: Led CDP architecture and audience governance strategy for a cross-platform infrastructure supporting tens of millions of users.
Developed audience governance frameworks across identity, taxonomy, and behavioral data, supporting the organization's shift toward audience-centric operations.
Drove cross-functional alignment across product, engineering, editorial, analytics, and business teams to scale audience infrastructure across five media brands.

groups.label: Rich Data Audience Intelligence Product
items: Led the design of a scalable audience intelligence framework integrating zero-party and first-party data across hundreds of audience attributes.
Defined behavioral interpretation models that translated user interactions into commercially actionable audience insights and segmentation strategies.
Designed audience accumulation logic at the SDK layer, overcoming CDP overwrite limitations while reducing implementation complexity.
Coordinated cross-functional stakeholders to scale zero-party data collection initiatives across multiple media properties.
Established commercialization foundations supporting precision targeting, sponsored audience campaigns, DaaS initiatives, and future Data Clean Room integrations.

groups.label: Analytics & Data Enablement
items: Co-led GA4 analytics architecture and centralized reporting frameworks to improve organization-wide data visibility and decision-making.
Served as an internal data partner across leadership, business, and product teams.

groups.label: Content Operations & Growth Strategy
items: Led audience growth, content strategy, SEO, and digital operations across platforms reaching millions of monthly pageviews and nearly 1M social followers.
Improved website conversion rates from 0.16% to 0.3% through audience analysis, placement optimization, and A/B experimentation.
Led SEO strategy using Ahrefs and SimilarWeb, achieving P1 keyword ranking rate exceeding 50% within 3 months.

groups.label: Cross-Functional Editorial Campaigns
items: Independently led a 50-page DEI and employee well-being research report, covering survey design, cross-analysis, expert interviews, corporate case studies, narrative development, and final writing; analyzed 4,688 employee responses across industry, gender, and generation to identify insights on inclusive leadership, mental health, workplace bias, retention intent, and employer-brand perception.
Established scalable editorial curation workflows by coordinating cross-functional teams across engineering, design, editorial, and newsroom operations.
Led multiple award-nominated editorial initiatives and received recognition through the First Media Summit Editorial Award.
Led public communication, media relations, and narrative strategy for museum initiatives and public engagement campaigns.
Translated complex human rights issues into accessible public narratives, with campaigns reaching 100K+ organic impressions.
Managed stakeholder communication across politically sensitive public issues.
